task_completion.description: Screaming Frog is set to List Mode and URLs are loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open. The 'Mode' is set to 'List' (indicated by the 'Upload' button at the top instead of the standard URL bar), and URLs from books.toscrape.com are visible in the main window.

task_completion.description: The crawl of the 20 landing pages is completed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The progress bar in Screaming Frog shows 100% completion, and the main 'Internal' tab is populated with approximately 20 rows of URL data.

task_completion.description: Internal results are exported as a CSV to the exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager window shows a .csv file (e.g., internal_all.csv) being saved to or existing in the ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ directory.

task_completion.description: A summary report file is created in the reports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows a file named 'landing_page_health.txt' located in the ~/Documents/SEO/reports/ directory.

task_completion.description: The summary report contains health check issues
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'landing_page_health.txt' are visible in a text editor and include a summary of the crawled pages, specifically mentioning SEO issues like status codes (e.g., 200, 404) or missing titles.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface being interacted with, not just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The CSV was exported from the application, not manually created
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file should be generated via Screaming Frog's 'Export' functionality (visible via save dialogs or standard Screaming Frog file naming conventions like 'internal_all.csv'), rather than manually typed in a spreadsheet or text editor.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine data from the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the summary report should reflect actual SEO metrics (like specific status codes or title lengths) rather than a generic template or copy-pasted text from the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URLs are from books.toscrape.com. Exactly 20 URLs are provided in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/landing_pages.txt. The exported CSV should be saved in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and typically contains 15-60 rows. The summary report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/landing_page_health.txt.
